evidence.claim: Used Terraform, LLMs, Forecasting, TensorFlow, TTS, Weights & Biases, GANs, Feature Engineering, Milvus, LangChain, Image Classification, BM25, OpenSearch, Prompt Engineering, XGBoost, LightGBM, OpenAI embeddings, Pinecone, GPT-4
Led the team that migrated keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.

evidence.claim: Deployment of RAG-based chatbot cut average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Collaborates with PMs to define optimization targets
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target (click-through vs. dwell time vs. downstream conversion) — that work was as important as the modeling itself.

evidence.claim: Learns primarily through shipping real systems and production load testing
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: 7.4 years of experience building ML-powered features in production
evidence.source_text: Machine learning engineer with 7.4 years of experience building ML-powered features in production.
